methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Seed → next-stage step-up multiplier (2.5x) to $8M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Space & Aerospace (found 0 same-stage, 1 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 23 same-sector peers exist in Space & Aerospace, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

methods.name: Public-Comp Anchoring
methods.skip_reason: target revenue not on file (private companies rarely disclose)
methods.rationale: Public Space & Aerospace P/S median is 59.8x across 6 tickers. Cannot apply without target's revenue.

data.narrative:
PierSight is a seed-stage Space & Aerospace company founded by Gaurav Seth that has raised $8M to date. The valuation analysis draws on a comp universe of 5 public peers (RKLB, PL, LUNR, ASTS, SATL) and 8 private-stage companies in the sector, though narrow peer matching proved constrained by limited same-stage comparables.

A stage-progression method is the primary applicable approach, using the $8M total raised as a valuation proxy and applying a 2.5x step-up multiplier typical for Seed-to-next-stage progression. This yields an implied valuation of $20M. Peer-median analysis could not be applied due to insufficient narrow peer datapoints within Space & Aerospace at the same or adjacent stage. Public-comp anchoring, while supported by a 59.8x median P/S across the five public tickers, remains inapplicable absent PierSight's revenue disclosure—standard for private companies at this stage.

The triangulation supports a valuation range of $17M to $23M, with a $20M median. This range reflects substantial uncertainty inherent in seed-stage valuation with limited comparable transactions. The key uncertainties are the lack of revenue data (precluding revenue multiple application), the sparse peer set at identical stage and scale, and the stage-progression method's reliance on typical multipliers rather than transaction-derived precedent. Revenue visibility and next funding round dynamics will be critical refinement points.
